message:
feat(writing): wire StackViz into article — replace inline placeholder

Pane 3 shipped StackViz in commit 01df835. Swapping the placeholder
card in the #what-is-it section for the real viz, adding the
viz-error-boundary wrapper + skeleton height, and registering the
stack viz id in the E2E spec.

bun tsc --noEmit clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
